mapper.sql: select receivable_id, sale_order_id, customer_id, amount_due, amount_paid, amount_due - ifnull(amount_paid, 0) as remain_amount, status, due_date, 0 as overdue_days, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from fin_receivable
mapper.select: select receivable_id, sale_order_id, customer_id, amount_due, amount_paid, amount_due - ifnull(amount_paid, 0) as remain_amount, status, due_date, 0 as overdue_days, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from fin_receivable where status in ('unpaid', 'partial') and amount_due - ifnull(amount_paid, 0) > 0 and due_date is not null and date(due_date) >= curdate() and date(due_date) <= date_add(curdate(), interval ifnull(#{remindDays}, 7) day) order by due_date asc, receivable_id desc

select receivable_id, sale_order_id, customer_id, amount_due, amount_paid, amount_due - ifnull(amount_paid, 0) as remain_amount, status, due_date, datediff(curdate(), date(due_date)) as overdue_days, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from fin_receivable where status in ('unpaid', 'partial') and amount_due - ifnull(amount_paid, 0) > 0 and due_date is not null and date(due_date) < curdate() order by overdue_days desc, receivable_id desc
select ifnull(sum(amount_due - ifnull(amount_paid, 0)), 0) from fin_receivable where customer_id = #{customerId} and status in ('unpaid', 'partial')
mapper.insert:
insert into fin_receivable
sale_order_id, customer_id, amount_due, amount_paid, status, due_date, create_by, create_time, remark,
#{saleOrderId}, #{customerId}, #{amountDue}, #{amountPaid}, #{status}, #{dueDate}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{remark},
mapper.update: update fin_receivable set amount_paid = #{amountPaid}, status = #{status}, update_time = sysdate() where receivable_id = #{receivableId}
update fin_receivable set amount_due = #{amountDue}, amount_paid = #{amountPaid}, status = #{status}, update_time = sysdate() where receivable_id = #{receivableId}
mapper.delete:
delete from fin_receivable where receivable_id in
#{receivableId}
